data.title: Canary Files Form S-1 for PENGU ETF
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to market news: Canary submitted an S-1 form to the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission to apply for the PENGU ETF. (Solidintel)

data.title: PENGU briefly broke through 0.0075 USDT, with a 24-hour increase of 10.02%
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: OKX market data shows that PENGU briefly broke through 0.0075 USDT and is currently trading at 0.007181 USDT, with a 24-hour increase of 10.02%.

data.title: Canary Files Application for PENGU ETF with SEC
data.description: According to Odaily, market reports indicate that Canary has submitted an S-1 form to the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) for the PENGU ETF.

data.title: White House Denies Trump-Canada PM Conversation Amid Tariff Concerns
data.description: According to BlockBeats, White House Press Secretary Levitt stated that there is no belief that U.S. President Donald Trump has engaged in talks with Canadian Prime Minister Carney. The situation involves the potential imposition of high tariffs.

data.title: PEPE band winning rate 100% giant whale withdraws 4.64 billion PEPE from Binance
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: According to @ai_9684xtpa’s monitoring, the PEPE band winning rate is 100%. The giant whale withdrew 4.64 billion PEPE from Binance again after a lapse of three months. He currently holds a total of 1.134 trillion PEPE (about 8.8 million US dollars), of which 1.048 trillion were opened at an average price of 0.00001735 US dollars since June last year. The current price of PEPE is 0.00000772 US dollars.

data.title: Trump reiterates promise not to sell Bitcoin seized by US
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: US President Trump will deliver a speech at the Digital Asset Summit (DAS) held in New York City. He once again promised not to sell the Bitcoin confiscated by the United States and to end regulatory mechanisms such as "Operation Stifle 2.0". In addition, Trump also stated that he wanted to make the United States a "Bitcoin superpower and the world's cryptocurrency capital." (Cointelegraph)

data.title: Bernstein lowered the target prices of several listed Bitcoin mining companies, but still maintained the target price of BTC at $200,000 by the end of the year
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News: Brokerage firm Bernstein has lowered its target prices for several listed Bitcoin mining companies, including IREN, CleanSpark and Riot Platforms, because their stock prices have performed far worse than BTC so far this year. Analyst Gautam Chhugani explained that Bitcoin miners have experienced a painful correction this year, falling 20-40%, while Bitcoin has fallen 10%. Overall, the price performance of listed miners has been disappointing, with no significant gains in the fourth quarter of last year and performance so far this year being worse than Bitcoin's correction.
However, Bernstein analysts maintained their price target of $200,000 for Bitcoin by the end of the year. (The Block)

data.title: Trump Advocates for Simplified Stablecoin Legislation at Blockworks DAS Conference
data.description: According to PANews, U.S. President Donald Trump addressed the Blockworks DAS Conference, urging the U.S. Congress to pass landmark legislation. He emphasized the need for straightforward and common-sense rules governing stablecoins and market structures.

data.title: Justin Sun: TRX tokens are now issued simultaneously on the Solana network
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Justin Sun announced on the X platform that TRX tokens are now issued simultaneously on the Solana network and can be purchased on the Solana chain.

data.title: Trump Declares U.S. Will ‘Dominate Crypto’ and Become ‘Undisputed Capital’ of Digital Assets
data.description: Former U.S. President Donald Trump made a bold statement at the Digital Asset Summit, vowing that the United States will dominate the crypto industry and lead the next generation of digital assets.“America will be the undisputed capital of crypto and digital assets. We are going to dominate this industry like no one else,” Trump declared during his speech.
